text:
I hear you, and I'm really glad you reached out. What you're feeling is valid — nursing is incredibly hard, and it's okay to not be okay.

Please reach out to one of these right now:
📞 Samaritans of Singapore (SOS): 1767 (available 24 hours)
📞 IMH Mental Health Helpline: 6389 2222 (available 24 hours)

If you're at work, please speak to your Nurse Unit Manager or a trusted colleague today. Your hospital's Employee Assistance Programme (EAP) is also there for you — ask your HR team to connect you.

You don't have to face this alone. Take one slow breath. You took a brave step by sharing this. Let me know if you want to see the resources available.
